scripts.env:setup: wp-env run cli wp theme activate the-drafting-table && wp-env run cli wp eval-file wp-content/themes/the-drafting-table/tests/wp-env/install-demo.php
scripts.themecheck: wp-env run cli wp plugin install theme-check --activate && wp-env run cli wp eval-file wp-content/themes/the-drafting-table/run-themecheck.php
scripts.qa: npm run env:start && npm run env:setup && npm run themecheck && npm run test:smoke
